description: You are a pre-calculus teacher creating an interactive GeoGebra lesson on conic sections. Create a construction demonstrating the geometric definition of a parabola as the locus of points equidistant from a focus F at (0, 1) and a directrix line y = -1. The parabola must be generated geometrically as a locus rather than by entering a function formula. The construction must include the focus, the directrix, a moveable point on the directrix, the locus trace, and an annotation demonstrating the equal-distance property at a point on the parabola. Save the construction as 'parabola_locus.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/
